title: Object Property Access
description: Retrieve values from an object using both dot and bracket notation.
problemStatement:
Objects store keyed data. Create an object `user = { name: "Bob", level: 5 }`. 
1. Print the name using dot notation (`user.name`).
2. Print the level using bracket notation (`user["level"]`).

**Expected Output:** 
`Bob` 
`5`
hints: Bracket notation is useful when the property name is stored in a variable.
